h4dbd1becg494bg4e3agafc0gcb51ce6a1672: And? Will you swear you'll take the poison?
hd28a4cd5gaa51g4718g9f0cgbd2983dc8360: By my sacred oath, I swear it.
hc2a40c5cgf0dbg432bgb475g3a2befb68064: I hope it doesn't come to that but... thank you. Here.
hee572484g7879g4be5gbc95gad7b62437fa0: And here's the antidote. Do not mix those two up.
hc65bc4e7g759fg4c3dga441g3991b2c9d6ff: I've spent my life treating folk and never once saw a mind flayer infection. Then suddenly there's dozens of you - maybe more.
hca20033egcc48g4543ga9e2g35bf17478c9b: Master Halsin and I were tracking them, studying them, trying to figure out what the Hells was going on.
h57f970c0gf1acg433cg820dgbac9503137ec: Because you should all be changing - there should be a small army of mind flayers out there! But you're not. Weird powers aside, you seem perfectly normal.
h5b9af4cfg6776g4d0ag8cd6g0ce650aa5169: What do you mean 'should' be changing?
h6d751969g2e8dg4430g8620g87b887058d2c: Mind flayers reproduce by infecting someone with their parasite. Seven gruesome days later, the victim transforms and a new mind flayer is born.
h7fb81ab2g50a8g4d5cga416g8eb4ee9cb8f1: The thing in your skull, though? It's different to anything in our records.
h526c3507g9e4fg4ff2g93bbg04bc75088321: It's one of their worms, for sure, but this one gives you powers - telepathic connections. And it doesn't turn you into one of them.
haab285abg2055g4d5eg8ef3gdebb89023b93: Could be, but there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
h794a591bge1eeg46adgacedg7a9c05b9bb62: When Master Halsin heard the adventurers were heading that way, he saw a chance to get answers. Joined on the spot.
hf01cc342ga207g4478g897fg1de5e62a717f: Whatever he found there, he didn't make it back.
h12ca4adaga0efg4a43gab48g3ef185288652: What do you want me to do?
h09f21d29g1909g4a5bg9e49g8cb6a4bc755d: The thing is, I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. None of us can even get close.
h23a04dfdgb52ag4460g87c8g38454d8057d8: You, though? You're one of them - technically speaking, I mean. They might not kill someone carrying their parasite.
h8abec9a5g2763g4828gb4e4g0fa540aafff3: If you can find Halsin and get him out of there, we can discover what he learned. And perhaps he can save your life. How's that sound?
heff781e8g24f0g4255ga89bgd8f40d1d5145: I already know where to find him: the wolf pens of the goblin camp.
h9f05379ag1d65g4aa4g9debg51125d0dd870: Gods above - why didn't you say so?
hb725e008gba31g452bg8501g1b419a07d770: Please, you have to bring him back to us. For your own sake as much as ours.
h74c9991cga0feg4564gbf9cgcf85f3468a4c: Thank you. It would mean everything to the grove. To me.
h2a3249e7g3107g4eeega034g377f0d7af0df: I wish I could tell you what happened out there, but those adventurers were the only witnesses. And they're long gone.
he5dd4107gd92fg4943g9e47g90c8e98bcf68: All I can say for sure is they all went to the old temple of Selûne and Master Halsin didn't make it back.
h1f53b370gc3dag4235ga781g78d42387764b: Good luck out there. And if things start to go bad - remember the oath you swore.
h7faaa4b3ge821g4c41g8606g71856de74915: Good luck out there. And if things start to go bad - remember the vial. Remember your oath.
h59c57f7ag8331g4b2eg8335g0d00f79c9dad: I wish I could tell you more, but only those adventurers know what happened out there.
h64b4aedfg0aedg4e23gbc57g62d9a2f912f7: It sounds like you're making a lot of assumptions that could kill me.
h7641471bg78cdg4ae5g9352g153fbba6e1fb: The way I see it, you have two options. Halsin, or that wyvern poison.
h621ddb9agd699g4bfag8271gff566fef18a8: I don't envy your choice, truly. But this is the hand fate's dealt you.
hab7e7fb2g7ec6g4c6cg9f6dg3c5bd7133b8e: The way I see it, you have two options. Halsin or death - whatever form it takes.
h30e3e9c8g4c17g4ac2gb6edge23d05a1a8d1: You're sure he can cure me?
h4a3c1849g5215g41b8g953fg41d1b36776fd: I can't make any promises. This is like nothing we've seen before.
hb67ad051g657fg4fa5g91feg4d50f90a79d3: But I know this for sure: Master Halsin is the only one close to understanding these things. He's your best bet to survive.
h10d6f9eag9c4eg4dfbgbb0dg56f1e8c9cbe0: Otherwise, that vial's your only option.
hbfeb39ebgd88ag40a7ga219gb77226d67875: Otherwise you'll need to end things yourself, before the transformation really takes hold.
hfe659c96g000eg40a1g9600g2da45bd3b73e: That sounds like suicide. I won't do it.
hdce5fcf5g8f1cg4bd3gae52g3ef68dffcc8c: It might be suicide either way. Trust me, you do not want to become one of those monsters.
h7f0bd17bgca41g4832g8900g153b1498da32: But of course, the choice is yours. I just hope you find a cure out there.
h9dea28c2ge9b5g43fdgb097g467f50285c8c: I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. And if my birds can't get close, what chance do I have?
he1676e82ga78cg4d4bgb1e7g511cbf68c479: I think so. I hope so. I've sent birds to find him, but they can't get close without goblins trying to shoot them down.
h78081aa6g7afdg4f14gb4c6gb0853086ba30: So you think it's only a matter of time?
h46f1e1bag81a1g403dgb061g2ec6c1be6c32: You said you were tracking other victims. Did they change?
h691fa15fg69b5g40d9gaa42g84dfaf33cd96: Hard to say, there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
ha929f1f5gd798g4619g9e5aga4cae929dd5f: Excellent news! All the power, none of the tentacles.
h03d74df1gc86eg4690ga21agce241d883473: I wouldn't be so sure, there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
hbb0c0a8bg142fg44ecgb19fg38dbfa60fbcb: You must've learned something from studying them?
hd0601b7dg577cg4727g95afg1d8e336a2671: For one, that thing in your head is like nothing we've ever seen from mind flayers.
h2a6537d0g03beg4028gba85gb4f5d1fb873e: Just tell me if there's a cure or not.
h159425dbg884eg401cg8e60g44773506fa5e: You can't cure what you don't understand. And as much as I know about mind flayers, I can't make heads nor tails of this.
h66eab944gb7bag41d6ga441g6b96579be6ca: I've spent my life treating folk and never once saw a mind flayer infection. Then suddenly there's dozens of you - maybe more.
h24332904g4a00g4451g8fbfg3aed45c0363c: Now, I've an antidote - um ... where is the bloody thing?
hbd1b8838g17edg4fa8g8c6fge18f52d7e7cc: Well, not to worry. Have a read of that book - Flora of the Dalelands. There's a recipe for your antidote in there. It won't do anything for what's in your skull, though.
h96cb7009gfa37g43f6g93e5g69c84d260e9f: Thank you. I truly hope it doesn't come to that.
h6e6d3142g8826g4639g9690g03cb74484fe1: Here, take this. It'll stop the poison, but I can't do anything for that wriggler in your head.
he42c53aagcb23g49b2ga958g6b5906d7a800: Fine, just give it to me.
hd1945d90g51c7g44abgb13agbb0e8d685df8: Have you lost your mind? No!
hb0647b49gcc31g4bedgbdadge33cf1e4c770: I don't want to hurt you, but I can't let you live. You're too dangerous.
h97f20a44g57b0g400fgb9afg7f33eded6550: Then we've nothing more to talk about.
hcbf33d4fg834dg4368g90d4g821efd4cfab8: And? Will you swear you'd die before you turn?
h2eafe167g5b4eg406bga040g7983a511df59: I hope your friend sees sense soon. He doesn't have much time left.
h98910ad6g781dg4381g9363g0c33a84aaed1: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know he'll take the wyvern poison if he starts to change.
h2f4d0244g1828g4204gb53dg954e63c5bc74: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know he'll do what has to be done, if it comes to that.
h0f360001ga83ag44e8g93e5gbda3e78320c1: I hope your friend sees sense soon. They don't have much time left.
h98ac8b0eg6957g4b7cg90bdg8ca3be4415f2: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know they'll take the wyvern poison if they start to change.
hea06aea4gce2eg48d8gb4f1gba4eed788404: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know they'll do what has to be done, if it comes to that.
hbef289d9g8b7dg4404gaafagea22df0887aa: I hope your friend sees sense soon. She doesn't have much time left.
ha8a73370g8fadg44e4ga6d5g0a9be5cb7457: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know she'll take the wyvern poison if she starts to change.
h38a98af8g32d1g47c4g9089g7ab22d1cc4a6: I want to help, but I can't. Not until I know she'll do what has to be done, if it comes to that.
h69450528g5e3ag4289gac11g5dbda51b49cd: You're alive? There's no way I'm stopping you, is there?
h54a39237g4f64g4d3egaa7ag6e8a1e5d8401: There's no stopping you, is there?
h8752a938gb6aag4ee2g8b8cgc597fdc3dd14: I'm sorry. There's nothing you can say to change my mind.
ha597eea8g2f3fg4b8egb45bg3293ac8d43cc: Yes? Is there anything I can do?
h112ddf72g940dg4414g842cg0acd073c9e20: I know where Halsin is! Give me the antidote or he'll die too!
h24670ea7g9426g4735g9403g70453cc2c78b: Hells' teeth. All right. I'll tell you where the antidote is, but there's a condition.
h0b4bd970g218fg4851g9306g0df110314516: This is a vial of wyvern poison. Swear to me you'll swallow it if you feel any symptoms.
ha6d8d19eg7cfcg4654ga14fg1e2df65c38be: Swear to me that if you feel any symptoms, you'll end things yourself.
h2d63fe8fg4403g4371ga056gf3f404553175: We can both see I have no symptoms - I'm not about to change!
hfd1103ecg149ag4529gb04cg242fbd9d9997: Same as the drow... But Master Halsin said he'd turn eventually.
ha7ffd1dcg192eg49a1gbeedgba0a85f4a6bc: Eventually? That gives me time to find a cure.
h024be13fg4d2ag4518ga456g154f2ebc9453: All right! Master Halsin thought the tadpole was dormant, so you have some time. Perhaps it's only fair I let you use it.
h980a5ab1g6fd0g40d2gb942g91a641b4bc54: But first - this is a vial of wyvern poison. Swear to me you'll swallow it if you feel any symptoms.
h3acb5342g209fg4909g8521g7fdc8a1ef764: But first - swear to me that if you feel any symptoms, you'll end things yourself.
h77bd4173gcfe8g434cgbd1fg5fcfdd4b90dc: I'm sorry. There's nothing you can say to change my mind.
hd69e6d2bg49a6g4192gacb3g51de3ad95fea: The door's locked. Neither of us are leaving until this is done.
h1c944ae9g3973g4d66ga294g8df5b0eda240: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
hb9a00ddeg9306g413fgadb3gd6fa0b5466ac: Magic can cure me if you can't. I know the Weave well!
h431c6a6bg2f19g44c2ga10ag9bac5ba97964: The grove is in terrible danger - cure me and I'll tell your leader how to save it.
h18d3d8fagfb9bg4a59g947agb6102d748bf7: It's been days. If I was going to turn, it would've happened by now.
hde8fc369g81a9g45deg9eacg8b120588e322: Recite what you know of her order - this can't be allowed!
h52dec80eg49c4g41ffg96edgffe243ef1f25: Recite her order's druidic law - this can't be allowed!
hf444cd24gec77g4faagb0a9gc62580e448be: You can't do this - your leader needs to talk to me.
h8cafc682g1d87g4e8ega05cg5577670fb9da: You can't do this - I'm on a secret mission. Everything depends on it.
hd5aaf601g6305g4531gb624ge60f9309e4ff: It doesn't matter if you're Silvanus himself come to walk among us - infected is infected.
hda5c6b15g7dabg4ba0gabadg1615eb64899f: Try to recall the tenets of her order - she can't support this!
h625c4554gf407g46d6g90eeg3def792c8583: I know you're angry, but how many people would die if you changed? I can't take that risk.
h297301dcga24eg48c7ga59eg75ccfba21fca: Try to recall the tenets of her order - no druid could support this!
h4b8aff6dg490eg4013g8353g7cb11f8675d3: If it helps, he won't feel any pain. It's the best death I can give him.
h4f648df3g9ae1g4683ga199g13b58bf8e216: If it helps, they won't feel any pain. It's the best death I can give them.
hdc6f37e2g3207g4295g92efg975c07c92986: If it helps, she won't feel any pain. It's the best death I can give her.
